title: schmaltzia copallina
intro: Schmaltzia copallina, also known as the yellow copallina or copal tree, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Schmaltzia copallina include its ability to reduce fever, ease respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparation of Schmaltzia copallina typically involves infusing its leaves and bark in hot water or oil to create a tea or ointment that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
